body.docName: 新建通用申请单（草稿、审批通过、审批中）
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/apply/common/create 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/apply/common/create ## 接口描述 支持调用此接口新增草稿、审批通过的通用申请单 ### 自定义字段传值格式和说明如下：
字段类型 说明 fieldValue示例
单行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  单行文本11
多行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  多行文本11
数字 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  8.6
金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  9.6
单选 选项值，value以字符串格式传入 选项1
多选 选项值，value以Json格式字符串传入 [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]
下拉选择 支持单/多选，以自定义字段配置为准, value 以选项值传入 Json格式字符串 [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]
手机号码 value以字符串格式传入  18858885666
日期选择 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式传入 2023-08-01 12:30
日期区间 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式，用","拼接传入  2023-08-01 12:30,2023-08-02 12:30
银行卡号 value以字符串格式传入 6222252225436456
邮箱 value以字符串格式传入 123456@163.com
附件 附件编号，value以字符串格式传入 4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96
层级选择 选项层级、选项值，以及和选项路径所有节点的选项层级、选项值。选项层级以数字传入，选项值为字符串 [{\"level\": \"1\", \"value\": \"选项1\"}, {\"level\": \"2\", \"value:\": \"选项1-1\"}]
关联字段 value以字符串格式传入 关联字段值
表格 每一行根据序号值区分，每一行中，每个表格值将titleCode和value 传入 Json格式字符串 \[{\\"sequence\\": 1, \\"columnValues\\": \[{\\"titleCode\\": \\"NAME\\", \\"value\\": \\"张三\\"}, {\\"titleCode\\": \\"AGE\\", \\"value\\": \\"26\\"}\]}, {\\"sequence\\": 2, \\"columnValues\\": \[{\\"titleCode\\": \\"NAME\\", \\"value\\": \\"李四\\"}, {\\"titleCode\\": \\"AGE\\", \\"value\\": \\"28\\"}\]}\]
人员 value 以花名册编号传入 Json格式字符串 [\"EMP_NUMBER_01\", \"EMP_NUMBER_02\"]
单据部门 组织编码以字符串形式传入 00000001
单据项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]
关联单据 费控系统单据编号，以字符串形式传入 2023080202288221
申请金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  66\.6
城市 城市编码，以字符串形式传入 20
供应商 value以供应商编号传入 SUP20211109091900
客户 value以客户编号传入 Json格式字符串 [\"CUSTOMER_01\", \"CUSTOMER_02\"]
合同 value以合同编号传入 8768768768768
成本中心 value以成本中心编号传入 center001
档案选择 value以自定义档案选项编码传入 option01
部门 value以薪福通组织编码传入 Json格式字符串 [\"ORG_01\", \"ORG_02\"]
项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]
事业部 value以薪福通组织编码传入  00000211
事项 配置为必填时，业务类型编码必传，且下级存在事项和事由时，事项编码和事由编码必传。value以“业务类型编码,事项编码,事由编码”传入 Json格式字符串 \[\\"MATTER_TYPE_1\\", \\"MATTER_MISSION_1\\", \\"MATTER_DETAIL_1\\"\]
收款账户 value以个人或供应商银行账户号，开户行，户名传入 Json格式字符串；匹配启用状态的个人或供应商收款账户 \[\\"62256255478532541\\", \\"中国银行\\", \\"小朱\\"\]
## 调用方式 METHOD: POST CONTENT-TYPE: application/json ## 接口输入参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"eventNumber","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"01230705110652000636","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"outRelId","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%96%E9%83%A8%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billCompanyCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"Fx60001","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%EF%BC%9B%0A%0A%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billDepartmentCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"00000003","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%9B%0A%0A%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":true,"label":"%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billStatus","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"APPRV","desc":"%20DRAFT%EF%BC%9A%E8%8D%89%E7%A8%BF%EF%BC%9BAPPRV%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%EF%BC%9BAPPRV_PEND%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E4%B8%AD"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldNumber","required":true,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"MULTI_INPUT_170948711","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldValue","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%9A%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E4%B8%AD%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E5%92%8C%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E"}}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"multiPersonCollections","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%9A%E4%BA%BA%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":true,"label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"88888888","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%AD%94%E6%98%8E","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoBankName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoBranBankName","required":true,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E6%94%AF%E8%A1%8C%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%AD%E5%9B%BD%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E%E5%88%86%E8%A1%8C","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"accountNumber","required":true,"label":"%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","exampleValue":"6666666666666666666","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"payAmount","required":true,"label":"%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"18","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A9%E4%BD%8D%E6%95%B4%E6%95%B0%EF%BC%8C2%E4%BD%8D%E5%B0%8F%E6%95%B0"}}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"relatedBillId","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%86%85%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E5%8D%95%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billApplyAuthCheckType","maxLength":"5","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90","exampleValue":"Y","desc":"%20Y-%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%0D%0AN-%E4%B8%8D%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90%0D%0A%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BAY-%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90"}}]}][{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}] ## 接口输出参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2023100801856003","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":"%20SUC0000-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8CE0001-%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true-%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8Cfalse-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8F%90%E7%A4%BA%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}],"open":true}] ## 接口调用示例 请求报文： ``` { "eventNumber": "01230705110652000636", "outRelId": "", "billCompanyCode": "Fx60001", "billDepartmentCode": "00000003", "empNumber": "15216111200", "billStatus": "APPRV", “billApplyAuthCheckType": “Y”, "customFieldValues": [ { "fieldNumber": "MULTI_INPUT_170948711", "fieldValue": "多行文本" }, { "fieldNumber": "INPUT_170952407", "fieldValue": "单行文本" }, { "fieldNumber": "SELECT_171000487", "fieldValue": "选项1" }, { "fieldNumber": "MULTI_SELECT_220354459", "fieldValue": "[\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]" }, { "fieldNumber": "ACCESSORIES_220337971", "fieldValue": "[\"2f082b62-7bbc-4d2e-a3ea-20a929d243c1\", \"2a13b488-a283-4103-9f30-a6dca758749f\"]" }, { "fieldNumber": "INFINITY_SELECT_220351619", "fieldValue": "[\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]" }, { "fieldNumber": "PHONE_220349371", "fieldValue": "15896321563" }, { "fieldNumber": "DATE_220347723", "fieldValue": "2023-09-13 12:00" }, { "fieldNumber": "TIME_RANGE_220345171", "fieldValue": "2023-09-06 12:00,2023-09-09 20:48" }, { "fieldNumber": "BANK_CARD_220342627", "fieldValue": "3920830493898358399" }, { "fieldNumber": "EMAIL_220340075", "fieldValue": "2345@163.com" }, { "fieldNumber": "MULTI_LEVEL_SELECT_220334931", "fieldValue": "[\"酒店\", \"如家\"]" }, { "fieldNumber": "ADV_COST_CENTER_092626508", "fieldValue": "CENTER2022061400797806" }, { "fieldNumber": "ADV_DEPARTMENT_093116783", "fieldValue": "[\"00000003\"]" }, { "fieldNumber": "ADV_PROJECT_092619820", "fieldValue": "[\"PRJ20210825143205\"]" }, { "fieldNumber": "ADV_MATTER_093144576", "fieldValue": "{\"matterDetailNumber\":\"10003\",\"matterMissionNumber\":\"10002\",\"matterTypeNumber\":\"10001\"}" } ], "multiPersonCollections": [ { "empNumber": "88888888", "depoName": "孔明", "depoBankName": "中国银行", "depoBranBankName": "中国银行杭州分行", "accountNumber": "6666666666666666666", "payAmount": 18.0 } ] , "relatedBillId":"" } ``` 响应报文： ``` { "body": 2023100801856003, "returnCode": "SUC0000", "success": true, "message": "成功" } ``` ## 错误码说明 | 错误码| 错误信息| | --- | --- | | E0001|具体业务异常提示|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/apply/common/create

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/apply/common/create

接口描述

支持调用此接口新增草稿、审批通过的通用申请单

自定义字段传值格式和说明如下：

字段类型 说明 fieldValue示例
单行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  单行文本11
多行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  多行文本11
数字 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  8.6
金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  9.6
单选 选项值，value以字符串格式传入 选项1

多选

 选项值，value以Json格式字符串传入 [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]

下拉选择

 支持单/多选，以自定义字段配置为准, value 以选项值传入 Json格式字符串 [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]
手机号码 value以字符串格式传入  18858885666
日期选择

以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式传入

 2023-08-01 12:30
日期区间

以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式，用","拼接传入

 2023-08-01 12:30,2023-08-02 12:30
银行卡号 value以字符串格式传入 6222252225436456
邮箱 value以字符串格式传入 123456@163.com
附件 附件编号，value以字符串格式传入 4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96

层级选择

 选项层级、选项值，以及和选项路径所有节点的选项层级、选项值。选项层级以数字传入，选项值为字符串 [{\"level\": \"1\", \"value\": \"选项1\"}, {\"level\": \"2\", \"value:\": \"选项1-1\"}]
关联字段 value以字符串格式传入 关联字段值

表格

 每一行根据序号值区分，每一行中，每个表格值将titleCode和value 传入 Json格式字符串

[{\“sequence\”: 1, \“columnValues\”: [{\“titleCode\”: \“NAME\”, \“value\”: \“张三\”}, {\“titleCode\”: \“AGE\”, \“value\”: \“26\”}]},

{\“sequence\”: 2, \“columnValues\”: [{\“titleCode\”: \“NAME\”, \“value\”: \“李四\”}, {\“titleCode\”: \“AGE\”, \“value\”: \“28\”}]}]

人员

 value 以花名册编号传入 Json格式字符串 [\"EMP_NUMBER_01\", \"EMP_NUMBER_02\"]
单据部门 组织编码以字符串形式传入 00000001
单据项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]
关联单据 费控系统单据编号，以字符串形式传入

2023080202288221
申请金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入  66\.6
城市 城市编码，以字符串形式传入 20
供应商 value以供应商编号传入 SUP20211109091900
客户 value以客户编号传入 Json格式字符串 [\"CUSTOMER_01\", \"CUSTOMER_02\"]
合同 value以合同编号传入 8768768768768
成本中心 value以成本中心编号传入 center001

部门 value以薪福通组织编码传入 Json格式字符串 [\"ORG_01\", \"ORG_02\"]
项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]
事业部 value以薪福通组织编码传入  00000211
事项 配置为必填时，业务类型编码必传，且下级存在事项和事由时，事项编码和事由编码必传。value以“业务类型编码,事项编码,事由编码”传入 Json格式字符串

[\“MATTER_TYPE_1\”, \“MATTER_MISSION_1\”, \“MATTER_DETAIL_1\”]
